apigateway.stage.canarysetting.CfnAbout:
The `CanarySetting` property type specifies settings for the canary deployment in this stage.

`CanarySetting` is a property of the [AWS::ApiGateway::Stage](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/AWSCloudFormation/latest/UserGuide/aws-resource-apigateway-stage.html) resource.

apigateway.stage.canarysetting.Deploymen.Description: The identifier of the deployment that the stage points to.

apigateway.stage.canarysetting.PercentTr.Description: The percentage (0-100) of traffic diverted to a canary deployment.

apigateway.stage.canarysetting.StageVari.Description: Stage variables overridden for a canary release deployment, including new stage variables introduced in the canary. These stage variables are represented as a string-to-string map between stage variable names and their values.  Duplicates are not allowed.

apigateway.stage.canarysetting.UseStageC.Description: Whether the canary deployment uses the stage cache or not.
